## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd puppeteer && pytest` and `cd puppeteer/dashboard && npm run test -- --run`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`cd puppeteer/dashboard && npm run lint`)
- [ ] New database columns include a migration SQL file (`migration_vN.sql`)
- [ ] No changes to the `/ee` directory (community contributions to Enterprise Edition are not accepted)
- [ ] PR title follows the format: `type(scope): description` (e.g., `fix(jobs): handle null node assignment`)
